sellers_note: The 2021 Hyundai Elantra SEL offers exceptional value and a host of premium features that elevate your driving experience. Equipped with a 2.0L 4-cylinder engine and CVT transmission, this Elantra delivers an impressive 31 city/41 highway MPG, making it an efficient and economical choice. - Convenience Package: Wireless Device Charging, Smart Cruise Control w/Stop & Go, Full 10.25 LCD TFT Cluster, Heated Front Seats, Electronic Parking Brake, Leather-Wrapped Steering Wheel, Forward Collision Avoidance Assist - Carpeted Floor Mats, Cargo Net, Reversible Cargo Tray The Elantra SELs sleek exterior styling is matched by a well-appointed interior, featuring cloth seating, power windows, and a rearview camera. Advanced safety technologies like Electronic Stability Control and Traction Control provide added peace of mind on the road. Connectivity is key, and the Elantra SEL delivers with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration, allowing you to seamlessly access your favorite apps and content. The 6-speaker sound system provides a premium audio experience to accompany your commute or weekend adventures. Whether youre looking for a reliable daily driver or a versatile compact sedan, the 2021 Hyundai Elantra SEL is an exceptional choice that offers exceptional value and a wealth of desirable features.
